scripts.lint:parser: cd apps/parser-service && uv run ruff check .
scripts.format:parser: cd apps/parser-service && uv run ruff format .
scripts.typecheck:parser: cd apps/parser-service && uv run mypy src/
scripts.test:parser: cd apps/parser-service && uv run pytest tests/ -v
scripts.test:e2e: cd apps/web && npx playwright test e2e/ --project=chromium
scripts.test:all: npm run test:web && npm run test:parser

apps/parser-service/**/*.py: cd apps/parser-service && uv run ruff check --fix
cd apps/parser-service && uv run ruff format
